modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues accessing Qualtrics survey links.

full_description_text: Users are experiencing problems with Qualtrics survey links not directing them to the survey. This issue prevents them from completing the intended surveys. The problem was reported during a live call, indicating urgency and frustration.
description: Users are experiencing problems with Qualtrics survey links not directing them to the survey. This issue prevents them from completing the intended surveys. The problem was reported during a live call, indicating urgency and frustration.
